abilities.name: volt-absorb
abilities.shortEffect: Absorbs Electric moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
abilities.effect: Whenever an Electric-type move hits this Pokémon, it heals for 1/4 of its maximum HP, negating any other effect on it. This ability will not take effect if this Pokémon is Ground-type and thus immune to Electric moves. Electric moves will ignore this Pokémon's Substitute. This effect includes non-damaging moves, i.e. Thunder Wave.
abilities.flavorText: If hit by an Electric-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

abilities.name: natural-cure
abilities.shortEffect: Cures any major status ailment upon switching out.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon is cured of any major status ailment when it is switched out for another Pokémon. If this ability is acquired during battle, the Pokémon is cured upon leaving battle before losing the temporary ability.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's status conditions are cured when it switches out.

abilities.name: iron-fist
abilities.shortEffect: Strengthens punch-based moves to 1.2× their power.
abilities.effect: Moves flagged as being punch-based have 1.2× their base power for this Pokémon. Sucker Punch is not flagged as punch-based; its original, Japanese name only means "surprise attack".
